CREATE TYPE mood AS ENUM ('happy', 'sad', 'neutral');
CREATE TABLE person (name TEXT, current_mood mood);
INSERT INTO person (name, current_mood) VALUES ('Alice', 'happy'), ('Bob', 'sad'), ('Charlie', 'neutral');
CREATE TYPE activities AS ENUM ('swimming', 'running', 'reading');
CREATE TABLE person_activities (name TEXT, activity activities);
INSERT INTO person_activities (name, activity) VALUES ('Alice', 'swimming'), ('Bob', 'reading'), ('Charlie', 'running');
SELECT a.name, a.activity FROM person_activities a JOIN person p ON a.name = p.name WHERE p.current_mood = 'happy';
CREATE TABLE mood_statistics AS SELECT current_mood, COUNT(*) as count FROM person GROUP BY current_mood;
CREATE TYPE pet_breeds AS ENUM ('bulldog', 'poodle', 'maltese');
CREATE TABLE pets (owner TEXT, breed pet_breeds);
INSERT INTO pets (owner, breed) VALUES ('Alice', 'bulldog'), ('Bob', 'maltese');
SELECT p.name, p.current_mood FROM person p LEFT JOIN pets pt ON p.name = pt.owner WHERE pt.breed IS NULL;
CREATE TYPE day AS ENUM ('Monday', 'Tuesday', 'Wednesday', 'Thursday', 'Friday', 'Saturday', 'Sunday');
CREATE TABLE weekly_plan (day day, task TEXT);
INSERT INTO weekly_plan (day, task) VALUES ('Monday', 'Gym'), ('Friday', 'Movie');
SELECT w.day, w.task FROM weekly_plan w JOIN person p ON w.task = 'Gym' WHERE p.current_mood = 'happy';
CREATE TABLE my_inputs AS SELECT 'sunny' AS weather UNION ALL SELECT 'rainy' AS weather UNION ALL SELECT 'cloudy' AS weather;
CREATE TYPE weather_enum AS ENUM (SELECT weather FROM my_inputs);
SELECT enum_range(NULL::weather_enum) AS available_weather;
CREATE TYPE seasons AS ENUM ('Spring', 'Summer', 'Fall', 'Winter');
CREATE TABLE seasonal_activities (season seasons, activity TEXT);
INSERT INTO seasonal_activities (season, activity) VALUES ('Summer', 'Beach'), ('Winter', 'Skiing');
CREATE TABLE mood_activities (mood mood, activity TEXT);
INSERT INTO mood_activities (mood, activity) VALUES ('happy', 'Dancing'), ('sad', 'Crying');
SELECT ma.mood, ma.activity FROM mood_activities ma JOIN person p ON ma.mood = p.current_mood WHERE ma.activity IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TYPE hobbies AS ENUM ('music', 'sports', 'art');
CREATE TABLE user_hobbies (username TEXT, hobby hobbies);
INSERT INTO user_hobbies (username, hobby) VALUES ('Alice', 'music'), ('Bob', 'sports');
SELECT u.username, u.hobby FROM user_hobbies u LEFT JOIN person p ON u.username = p.name WHERE p.current_mood IS NULL;
CREATE OR REPLACE TYPE new_mood AS ENUM ('excited', 'anxious');
CREATE TABLE person_2 (name TEXT, current_mood mood, future_mood new_mood);
INSERT INTO person_2 (name, current_mood, future_mood) VALUES ('Alice', 'happy', 'anxious'), ('Bob', 'sad', 'excited');
SELECT * FROM person_2 WHERE current_mood = future_mood;
CREATE TYPE mood_type AS ENUM ('happy', 'excited', 'sad');
SELECT 'sad'::mood_type < 'excited'::mood_type AS comparison;
SELECT unnest(['happy'::mood_type, 'excited'::mood_type, 'sad'::mood_type]) AS mood_order ORDER BY mood_order;
